steps.title: Identify the additive relationship
steps.content:
The passage establishes one reason why Hilo soil is fitting (abundance across the state), then introduces a second reason supporting the same conclusion (importance to agriculture).

The key signal is the cumulative nature — the second reason is being added to strengthen the argument, not opposed or presented as an alternative.

steps.title: Match the additive transition
steps.content:
Additionally introduces a second supporting reason, which correctly conveys how the agricultural importance of Hilo soil adds to its abundance to justify the fitting choice.

The other three signal contrast, alternatives, or time progression — none of which fit this additive structure.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
